title: Theoria Division — Agent Report Schema
description: Standard report payload schema for all Theoria Operations agents. Enforced by Archon coordination skill.

agent.description: ID of the agent producing this report.

status.description: COMPLETE = full run. PARTIAL = missing expected output. FLAGGED = requires command attention.

payload.description: Agent-specific data. Structure varies by agent and report_type. See SKILL.md sections 4a–4c.
